_publications._publicationTitle: The loss of Nf1 transiently promotes self-renewal but not tumorigenesis by neural crest stem cells.

_contextSnippet: Germline Nf1−/− embryos die from a cardiac defect by embryonic day (E)14.5
details: Germline Nf1-/- embryos die from cardiac defect by embryonic day E14.5
